evidence.text: The Company's order rates provide a near-term perspective of the Company's outlook particularly when viewed in the context of prior and future order rates.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: The summary indicates accelerating demand, supported by order rates as a near-term indicator.

evidence.text: The Company believes the leading economic indicators of these markets that have a correlation to the Company's future order rates are as follows:

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: A growing backlog suggests strong future demand, aligning with positive sentiment.

evidence.text: Net sales in 2017 were 5.9 percent higher than 2016. The increase in net sales in 2017 was primarily a result of acquisitions made in the last 12 months (which contributed approximately $558 million in sales in 2017) and an increase in volume in both the Diversified Industrial International operations and the Aerospace Systems Segment, partially offset by the effect of currency rate changes (which decreased net sales in 2017 by approximately $84 million).
evidence.subsection: Discussion of Consolidated Statement of Income

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Decelerating organic growth indicates a moderate headwind, despite overall sales increases.

evidence.text: The increase in net sales in 2017 was primarily due to acquisitions made in the last 12 months (which contributed approximately $558 million in sales in 2017) and an increase in volume in both the Diversified Industrial International operations and the Aerospace Systems Segment, partially offset by the effect of currency rate changes (which decreased net sales in 2017 by approximately $84 million).
evidence.subsection: Discussion of Consolidated Statement of Income

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Growing unit volumes, supported by evidence of increased sales, suggest positive momentum.

factors.summary: End markets are growing fastest in aerospace and defense.

evidence.text: Global aircraft miles flown increased by approximately six percent and global revenue passenger miles increased approximately seven percent from their comparable 2016 levels. The Company anticipates that U.S. Department of Defense spending with regards to appropriations, and operations and maintenance for the U.S. Government's fiscal year 2017 will increase slightly from the comparable fiscal 2016 level.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Strong growth in aerospace and defense end markets points to a positive trajectory.

evidence.text: Foreign currency transaction (gain) loss (relating to cash, marketable securities and other investments and intercompany transactions) included in cost of sales for 2017, 2016 and 2015 was $8.1 million, $22.7 million and $(77.8) million, respectively.
evidence.subsection: Discussion of Consolidated Statement of Income

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Stable input costs, with evidence of fluctuation, do not indicate a clear trend.

evidence.text: Pension cost included in cost of sales in 2017, 2016 and 2015 was $135.0 million, $172.4 million and $169.8 million, respectively.
evidence.subsection: Discussion of Consolidated Statement of Income

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Manageable labor costs, with fluctuating pension expenses, show no clear direction.

evidence.text: Gross profit margin increased in 2017 primarily due to lower operating expenses resulting from the Company's simplification initiative and other restructuring activities, primarily experienced in the Diversified Industrial Segment, partially offset by lower margins in the Aerospace Systems Segment and higher amortization expense in the Diversified Industrial Segment.
evidence.subsection: Discussion of Consolidated Statement of Income

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: Expanding gross margins due to cost reductions and restructuring indicate significant positive development.

factors.summary: Cost reduction programs are delivering measurable savings.

evidence.text: The increase in 2017 was primarily due to higher amortization expense resulting from current-year acquisitions and higher acquisition expenses partially offset by lower expenses resulting from the Company's simplification initiative, lower expenses associated with the Company's deferred compensation program and lower professional services expenses.
evidence.subsection: Discussion of Consolidated Statement of Income

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: The evidence shows measurable savings from cost reduction initiatives.

evidence.text: The Company believes it can meet its strategic objectives by: Serving the customer and continuously enhancing its experience with the Company; Successfully executing its Win Strategy initiatives relating to premier customer service, financial performance and profitable growth; Maintaining its decentralized division and sales company structure; Fostering an entrepreneurial culture; Engineering innovative systems and products to provide superior customer value through improved service, efficiency and productivity; Delivering products, systems and services that have demonstrable savings to customers and are priced by the value they deliver; Acquiring strategic businesses; Organizing around targeted regions, technologies and markets; Driving efficiency by implementing lean enterprise principles; and Creating a culture of empowerment through its values, inclusion and diversity, accountability and teamwork.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Evidence highlights improvements in operational efficiency through various initiatives.

factors.summary: Management is confident in long-term growth opportunities.

evidence.text: The Company believes many opportunities for growth are available. The Company intends to focus primarily on business opportunities in the areas of energy, water, food, environment, defense, life sciences, infrastructure and transportation.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Management expresses confidence in growth opportunities across multiple strategic areas.

factors.summary: Near-term risks include economic uncertainties and geopolitical factors.

evidence.text: The Company makes these statements as of the date of the filing of its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ended June 30, 2017 , and undertakes no obligation to update them unless otherwise required by law.

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Summary mentions risks but evidence does not elaborate on their impact.

factors.summary: Long-term strategic direction is clear and well-resourced.

evidence.text: The Company believes it can meet its strategic objectives by: Serving the customer and continuously enhancing its experience with the Company; Successfully executing its Win Strategy initiatives relating to premier customer service, financial performance and profitable growth; Maintaining its decentralized division and sales company structure; Fostering an entrepreneurial culture; Engineering innovative systems and products to provide superior customer value through improved service, efficiency and productivity; Delivering products, systems and services that have demonstrable savings to customers and are priced by the value they deliver; Acquiring strategic businesses; Organizing around targeted regions, technologies and markets; Driving efficiency by implementing lean enterprise principles; and Creating a culture of empowerment through its values, inclusion and diversity, accountability and teamwork.

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: Evidence shows a clear, comprehensive, and well-resourced strategic plan.

factors.summary: Key sensitivities include economic conditions and foreign exchange rates.

factors.summary: Catalysts include new product launches and strategic acquisitions.

evidence.text: The Company completed three acquisitions, including the acquisition of Clarcor which is further discussed in Note 2 to the Consolidated Financial Statements included in Part II, Item 8 of this Annual Report on Form 10-K. Acquisitions will be considered from time to time to the extent there is a strong strategic fit, while at the same time maintaining the Company’s strong financial position.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Evidence indicates successful acquisitions and strategic focus on growth areas.

factors.summary: Overall economic conditions are a tailwind.

evidence.text: The Company believes many opportunities for growth are available. The Company intends to focus primarily on business opportunities in the areas of energy, water, food, environment, defense, life sciences, infrastructure and transportation.

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: Evidence suggests favorable economic conditions aiding growth opportunities.

factors.summary: Foreign exchange movements are impacting net sales.

evidence.text: Net sales in 2017 were 5.9 percent higher than 2016. The increase in net sales in 2017 was primarily a result of acquisitions made in the last 12 months (which contributed approximately $558 million in sales in 2017) and an increase in volume in both the Diversified Industrial International operations and the Aerospace Systems Segment, partially offset by the effect of currency rate changes (which decreased net sales in 2017 by approximately $84 million).
evidence.subsection: Discussion of Consolidated Statement of Income

sentiment.label: negative
